scripts.dev: npm run dev:cleanup && npx concurrently "npm run dev -w web" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.preview:live: npm run dev:cleanup && npx concurrently --names web,api,desktop --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev -w web" "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev:full -w @nexusforge/desktop"
scripts.beta:start: npm run dev:cleanup && npx concurrently "npm run beta:web" "npm run beta:api"
scripts.desktop:full: npm run dev:cleanup && npx concurrently --names web,api,desktop --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev -w web" "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev:full -w @nexusforge/desktop"
scripts.desktop:install:ui: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$installer = Get-ChildItem 'apps\desktop\release','apps\desktop\release-new' -Filter 'NexusForge Desktop Setup *.exe' -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1; if ($installer) { Start-Process $installer.FullName } else { Write-Error 'Installer not found. Run desktop:installer first.' }"
scripts.desktop:open:installed: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$registryRoots = @('HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\*', 'HKLM:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\*'); $registryEntry = Get-ItemProperty $registryRoots -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.DisplayName -match '^NexusForge Desktop' } | Select-Object -First 1; $candidatePaths = New-Object System.Collections.Generic.List[string]; if ($registryEntry) { if ($registryEntry.InstallLocation) { $candidatePaths.Add((Join-Path $registryEntry.InstallLocation 'NexusForge Desktop.exe')); } $uninstallExe = [regex]::Match($registryEntry.UninstallString, '^\"(.*?)\"').Groups[1].Value; if ($uninstallExe) { $candidatePaths.Add((Join-Path (Split-Path -Parent $uninstallExe) 'NexusForge Desktop.exe')); } } $candidatePaths.Add((Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'Programs\NexusForge Desktop\NexusForge Desktop.exe')); $candidatePaths.Add('C:\Program Files\NexusForge Desktop\NexusForge Desktop.exe'); $candidatePaths.Add('C:\Program Files (x86)\NexusForge Desktop\NexusForge Desktop.exe'); $exe = $candidatePaths | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ } | Select-Object -First 1; if ($exe) { Start-Process $exe; return }; if ($registryEntry) { Write-Error "NexusForge Desktop is installed, but the executable could not be resolved from registry metadata. Registry install location: $($registryEntry.InstallLocation); uninstall string: $($registryEntry.UninstallString)" } else { Write-Error 'Installed NexusForge Desktop executable not found. Run desktop:installer first.' }"
scripts.desktop:open:unpacked: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$exe = Resolve-Path 'apps\desktop\release\win-unpacked\NexusForge Desktop.exe' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($exe) { Start-Process $exe.Path } else { Write-Error 'Unpacked executable not found. Run desktop:installer first.' }"
scripts.build: npm run brand:verify && npm run build -w web && npm run build -w @nexusforge/server
